channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Supreme Court expands Trump's immigration powers, experts warn of faster U.S. population decline
item.description: The U.S. population was already aging and nearing decline. After the Supreme Court upheld Trump's ability to deport hundreds of thousands, experts caution...

item.title: If a Lyme disease vaccine is approved, will people take it? We asked hunters
item.description: Drugmakers are developing a new shot to prevent Lyme disease. How might it be received in an era of vaccine skepticism?

item.title: Opinion: Ranch dressing emerges as a hit at the World Cup
item.description: NPR's Scott Simon comments on how ranch dressing has become popular with international visitors during the World Cup.

item.title: Trump administration partially lifts export ban on Anthropic's most advanced AI model
item.description: The U.S. government is asserting a new level of influence over AI, controlling which companies can access Anthropic's new models. OpenAI agreed to let...
